creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: olivierd
Date: Wed Jul 24 17:42:09 2013
New Revision: 323613
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323613

Log:
  - Update to 0.11
  - Add new option, PYGMENTS (syntax highlighting) to enable code directive
  - Fix symlinks during reinstall stage [1]
  - Fix pkg-plist with Python3 [2]
  
  PR:		179273 [1]
  PR:		180339 [2]
  Submitted by:	nemysis [1]
  Reviewed by:	gblach@ [2]

Modified:
  head/textproc/py-docutils/Makefile
  head/textproc/py-docutils/distinfo
  head/textproc/py-docutils/pkg-plist

Modified: head/textproc/py-docutils/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-docutils/Makefile	Wed Jul 24 17:26:21 2013	(r323612)
+++ head/textproc/py-docutils/Makefile	Wed Jul 24 17:42:09 2013	(r323613)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	docutils
-PORTVERSION=	0.10
+PORTVERSION=	0.11
 CATEGORIES=	textproc python
 MASTER_SITES=	SF \
 		CHEESESHOP
@@ -15,13 +15,29 @@ COMMENT=	Python Documentation Utilities
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 
+OPTIONSFILE=	${PORT_DBDIR}/py-${PORTNAME}/options
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	PYGMENTS
+PYGMENTS_DESC=	Syntax highlighting
+
 BIN_SCRIPTS=	rst2html.py rst2s5.py rst2latex.py rst2xetex.py \
 	rst2man.py rst2xml.py rst2pseudoxml.py rstpep2html.py \
 	rst2odt.py rst2odt_prepstyles.py
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPYGMENTS}
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pygments>=1.6:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-pygments
+.endif
+
+.if ${PYTHON_REL} >= 320
+.include "${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-virtualenv/files/py3k-fix-pkg-plist.inc"
+.endif
+
 post-install:
 .for script in ${BIN_SCRIPTS}
-	@cd ${PREFIX}/bin && ${LN} -s ${script} ${script:C/\.py//}
+	@cd ${PREFIX}/bin && ${LN} -sf ${script} ${script:C/\.py//}
 .endfor
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/textproc/py-docutils/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-docutils/distinfo	Wed Jul 24 17:26:21 2013	(r323612)
+++ head/textproc/py-docutils/distinfo	Wed Jul 24 17:42:09 2013	(r323613)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (docutils-0.10.tar.gz) = 370624e61b6773da2f2fb17cc2a4eaea4bb596c3585d13f75ff193c1c738603e
-SIZE (docutils-0.10.tar.gz) = 1602552
+SHA256 (docutils-0.11.tar.gz) = 9af4166adf364447289c5c697bb83c52f1d6f57e77849abcccd6a4a18a5e7ec9
+SIZE (docutils-0.11.tar.gz) = 1611755

Modified: head/textproc/py-docutils/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-docutils/pkg-plist	Wed Jul 24 17:26:21 2013	(r323612)
+++ head/textproc/py-docutils/pkg-plist	Wed Jul 24 17:42:09 2013	(r323613)
@@ -48,6 +48,9 @@ bin/rstpep2html.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/languages/cs.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/languages/cs.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/languages/cs.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/languages/da.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/languages/da.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/languages/da.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/languages/de.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/languages/de.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/languages/de.pyo
@@ -190,6 +193,9 @@ bin/rstpep2html.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/parsers/rst/languages/cs.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/parsers/rst/languages/cs.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/parsers/rst/languages/cs.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/parsers/rst/languages/da.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/parsers/rst/languages/da.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/parsers/rst/languages/da.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/parsers/rst/languages/de.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/parsers/rst/languages/de.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/docutils/parsers/rst/languages/de.pyo
